product.title: Coccinelle TEBE - Cross body bag - warm taupe
product.description: Height: 13 cm (Size One Size) Length: 19 cm (Size One Size) Width: 6 cm (Size One Size) Carrying handle: 19 cm (Size One Size) Compartments: Front pocket Fastening: Zip Details: Buckle Volume: 1 l (Size One Size) Weight: 295 g Carrying options: Removable cross-body strap, adjustable cross-body strap Article number: CO351H1TB-B13

product.title: Kabelis Unitek Y-C453 USB 3.0, Micro USB, 0.2 m, balta krāsā
product.category-name: Datoru tehnika / Kabeļi un vadi / USB kabeļi
product.description: Preces tips: Kabelis / Adapteris Modelis: Y-C453 Laida ilgis / Garums: 0.2 m Krāsa: Balta 1. savienojums: USB 3.0 Type-A Female (Gredzens) 2. savienojums: Micro USB Type-B Male (Spraudnis) Funkcija: USB OTG (On-The-Go) EAN / Svītrkods: 4894160007995
